meta.title: MyQuickPaste for Business — Smartphone Edition
meta.description: Save frequently used text on your phone and copy it with one tap. MyQuickPaste for Business is a lightweight smartphone app for snippets, contacts, and templates. Free download with a 30-day Pro trial.

hero.catch: Save what you use every day. Copy with one tap.
hero.lead: MyQuickPaste for Business is a lightweight smartphone app built for people who repeat the same text—replies, addresses, phone numbers, and profile details. Organize by category, tap a row, and paste anywhere.
hero.platformLine: Available on Android · iPhone & iPad coming soon
hero.trialText: Try every Pro feature free for 30 days after install. No credit card required in the app.
hero.trust: On-device storage · No cloud upload · 21-language UI

stores.microsoftBadgeAlt: Get it from Microsoft (MyQuickPaste for PC)
stores.pcNote: The Microsoft Store badge links to MyQuickPaste for Windows.

compare.title: Part of the MyQuickPaste family
compare.subtitle: Same idea—optimized for each device.
compare.pcText: Windows app for always-on-top paste from the corner of your screen.
compare.mobileText: This page. Tap-to-copy lists, profile cards, and mobile backup.
compare.note: These are separate apps. Purchases and data are not shared between PC and smartphone editions.

problem.title: Sound familiar on mobile?
items: Searching old chats or notes every time you need the same address or phone number
Retyping email signatures and canned replies on a small keyboard
Switching between apps just to copy one line of text again
problem.solution: Save it once in MyQuickPaste for Business. Open the app, tap, and paste—wherever you are.

clipboardCompare.title: How this differs from Gboard clipboard
clipboardCompare.subtitle: Gboard is faster for something you copied recently. Both still have a place.
clipboardItems: Pick from the keyboard and paste—fastest path
Automatically saves strings you copied lately
History gets mixed; older clips are pushed out
Not built for categories or profile-style blocks
clipboardCompare.appTag: A shelf for text you keep reusing
appItems: Register addresses, signatures, and replies by name
Six categories: freeword, snippets, mail, phone, address, profile
Stays until you delete it—no history push-out
Opening the app takes a step—built for favorites, not last hour
clipboardCompare.footer: Copied it a few hours ago? Gboard wins on speed. Same text every week? Register it here and skip the search.

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: Three taps from save to paste.

items.title: Save by category
items.text: Freeword, snippets, email, phone, address, and profile cards—each in its own tab.

items.title: Tap to copy
items.text: Tap any row to copy the full text. Long-press for a quick preview before copying.

items.title: Paste anywhere
items.text: Switch to mail, chat, maps, or any app and paste instantly.

items.title: Built for thumbs
items.text: Large rows, category tabs, and a portrait layout designed for one-handed use on the go.

items.title: Structured, not messy
items.text: Separate lists for snippets, contacts, and profile cards instead of one endless note.

items.title: Private by design
items.text: Your data stays on your device. Nothing is sent to our servers.

features.title: Key features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for mobile copy-and-paste workflows.

items.title: Category tabs
items.text: Freeword, snippets, email, phone, address, and profile—switch instantly.

items.title: Tap to copy
items.text: One tap copies the full content. Optional vibration feedback when copied.

items.title: Long-press preview
items.text: Preview title and body before copying long entries.

items.title: Profile cards
items.text: Store personal and work contact blocks; copy individual fields with a tap.

items.title: Reorder mode
items.text: Long-press a category tab to reorder items and keep favorites on top.

items.title: Backup (Pro)
items.text: Export and import your data as JSON for device migration or safekeeping.

items.title: 21-language UI
items.text: Use the app in English, Japanese, and 19 more languages.

items.title: Light & dark theme
items.text: Follow system theme or choose light, dark, or system in Settings.

items.title: Field & sales teams
items.text: Copy addresses, phone numbers, and standard replies while visiting clients.

items.title: Office & support
items.text: Keep canned responses and contact details ready on your phone.

items.title: Personal productivity
items.text: Store your home address, email signatures, and frequently used phrases.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more capacity and backup.
freeItems: Up to 5 saved items per category
proItems: One-time purchase via Google Play / App Store
pricing.note: The app is free to download. Pro is a non-consumable add-on purchased through your app store. Prices may vary by region.

privacySection.title: Your data stays on your phone
privacySection.text: Saved text, profile cards, and settings are stored only on your device. We do not operate a cloud sync service or collect your snippet content.

cta.title: Stop retyping the same text on your phone
cta.lead: Download free, try every Pro feature for 30 days, and keep what works on the free plan.

footer.copyright: Copyright © 2025–2026 Good Rabbit inc., Japan. All rights reserved.

supportPage.title: Support
supportPage.lead: Help for MyQuickPaste for Business (smartphone edition).

items.q: Is this the same app as MyQuickPaste for Windows?
items.a: No. MyQuickPaste for Business is the smartphone edition. It shares the same product philosophy but is a separate app with its own data and store purchase.

items.q: What is the difference between Free and Pro?
items.a: Free includes up to 5 items per category and 2 profile cards. Pro expands capacity and unlocks JSON export and import. New installs receive a 30-day trial of all Pro features.
All Pro features are available for 30 days from first launch. After the trial, you can continue on the free plan or purchase Pro in the store.
All data is stored locally on your device. It is not uploaded to our servers.

items.q: How do I back up or move my data?
items.a: Pro users can export a JSON backup from Settings and import it on another device running MyQuickPaste for Business.

items.q: When will the iPhone version be available?
items.a: The iOS edition is in preparation. This page will be updated when it launches on the App Store.
Open the in-app upgrade screen or the store listing for the Pro add-on. Billing is handled entirely by Google Play or the App Store.

supportPage.contactText: For bug reports and feature requests, email us:

sections.p: MyQuickPaste for Business is a smartphone application provided by Good Rabbit inc. ("we", "us"). This policy describes how the app handles information on your device.
We do not collect, transmit, or store your saved snippets, profile cards, or clipboard content on our servers. The app is designed to keep your data on your device.
Your entries, categories, profile cards, and app settings are saved in the app's private storage area on your smartphone. You are responsible for backups (Pro export) and device security.
Downloads, trials, and Pro purchases are processed by Google Play or the Apple App Store. Payment and license verification are subject to each store's privacy policy and terms.
If you have questions about this policy, contact us at myquickpaste@hotmail.com.
